lines: ROM load + soft-boot (kernel FPGA path only — not used by launched games).
$7F36=$03: 512-byte load cmd window at $A000; build ROM in FPGA buffer.
$7FE0=$80: reset into loaded ROM; same FRAM chip, FPGA emulates game MBC.
See docs/fram-save-map.md and sd/README.md.
SetRomLoadCtrl_B4: $7F36 load mode ($00=off, $01=map cmd buf, $03=initiate).
ROMLOAD build: copy SD sectors into FPGA ROM buffer via load cmd window.
U32ToAscii(val, buf, radix): write unsigned long as ASCII into buf (NUL-term).
Stack RTL: val u32, char* buf, u8 radix. Digits via U32Div/U32Mod,
then reverse into buf; 0-9 -> '0'+n, 10+ -> 'a'+(n-10) (+$57). Callers pass
radix $0a (decimal). Local $34-byte digit scratch. Bank0 copy: U32ToAscii_B0 ($16f4).
U32ToAscii_B0: bank0 near-call copy of U32ToAscii (04:44f7). Same stack ABI;
used from bank0/1/8 UI chrome.
SetGfxMode: wGfxMode=L; jp 4-byte table at $01e2 (mode&3). Wrappers:
SetGfxModeStack ($06ef), GetGfxMode ($06f8) returns E=wGfxMode.
SetFpgaPage_B4: bank-4 copy of SetFpgaPage (unlock $7F00/10/20, $7FC0=page,
commit $7FF0). Byte-identical to SetFpgaPage_B0/B1; near-call only within bank.
SetFpga7FD0_B4: same unlock/commit as SetFpgaPage but writes stack u8 to $7FD0.
See docs/REGISTERS.md ($7fd0/$7fd2/$7fd4 peripheral enable candidates).
SetFpgaPage: unlock → $7FC0=page (arg on stack; $03=cart FRAM window) → commit.
With $7FC0=$03, $4000 latches FRAM bank; $A000-$BFFF is non-volatile FRAM
(no battery; cart battery is RTC-only). See docs/fram-save-map.md.
LoaderPrepPath: assemble /dir/NAME path into $c2a6. First hop of the $1569
launch chain ($482b → $4048 → $4000 → $5e14). See docs/launch-trace.md.
LastRomPersist: copy the assembled launch path ($c2a6, 255 bytes) into cart
NVRAM $A300 (select bank 17, FPGA rompage $03). Read back by LastRomOverlay
on START. See docs/last-rom.md.
Pre-launch FRAM stamp on page $11 (SetFpgaPage_B1 $03), written on every launch:
$A000=$AA (backup pending), $A001=auto-save flag, $A00F=save bank count,
$A010+=save basename for SAVER/*.SAV. Armed per-launch, not per save-write.
Ends at Jump_001_58ad; LaunchSetup (01:58b0) is the next launch-trace step.
RomLoaderMain: main ROM loader (bank 1). SD stream → FPGA ROM buffer, MBC/size
config ($7FC*), then installs the WRAM boot stub. See docs/launch-trace.md.
BackupSavePrompt: draw BACKUPSAVE box. Arg (page $11 $A001) ==1 -> auto 'Saving..'
and dump; else prompt [B]NO=skip / [A]OK=dump FRAM to SAVER/*.SAV.
RunCallbackList: shared IRQ dispatcher. HL = list base (uint16 fn ptrs,
0-terminated). Nest via wIntNest; CallHL each slot. Vectors: VBlank→wVBlankCallbacks
($d6d3), LCD→$d6e3, Timer→$d6f3, Serial→$d703, Joypad→$d713.
RegisterVBlankCallback: HL=wVBlankCallbacks, jp InstallCallbackSlot (BC=fn).
Siblings: RegisterLcdCallback $0634, RegisterTimerCallback $063a,
RegisterSerialCallback $0640, RegisterJoypadCallback $0646. Matching Remove*
wrappers at $0610–$0628. See decomp/src/register_callback_slots.c.
RegisterLcdCallback: install BC into wLcdCallbacks ($d6e3). EnterGfxMode1
registers LycCb_Bg8800 ($2a6a) here and enables STAT LYC after RegisterVBlankCallback.
DrawCircle: midpoint circle. BC=center, D=radius; wDrawRectFill selects outline
(CirclePlot8) vs filled chords (CircleFillH/CircleFillV). Error in wCircleErr
($d72c). Stack wrapper DrawCircleXY ($27a0).
DrawCircleXY: stack (x, y, r, fill); ensure EnterGfxMode1 then DrawCircle.
CirclePlot8: plot the 8 symmetric pixels for current (x,y) on the circle.
DrawGlyph(C=tile): blit 8×8 from font sheet $3206 into framebuffer at
wTextCursorX/Y via GfxRowTable. DrawGlyphAdvance ($2770) wraps this +
AdvanceTextCursor.
SetTextCursor: store stack col/row into wTextCursorX/Y ($d732/$d733).
DrawRectImpl: normalize wDrawX0/X1 and wDrawY0/Y1, outline via four DrawLine
calls, optional fill when wDrawRectFill ($d724) nonzero. Called by DrawRect.
DrawRect: if wGfxMode!=1 call EnterGfxMode1; copy 5 stack args into wDrawX0/Y0/
X1/Y1/wDrawRectFill; call DrawRectImpl. C-shape ~ (u8 fill, u16, u16).
Used e.g. from BatteryCheck chrome; generic (many callers).
InstallCallbackSlot: walk uint16 list at HL, store BC (fn ptr) in first free slot.
RemoveCallbackSlot ($064c) finds BC and compacts the tail. HL/BC register ABI.
WaitVBlankFlag: halt until VBlank sets $D6CE; no-op if LCD is off.
LcdOff: wait for a safe LY window, then clear LCDC bit 7; no-op if already off.
DrawString (ptr, len, screen pos). Highest fan-in text primitive (~86 callers).
Cursor set by SetTextCursor ($2765), advanced by AdvanceTextCursor ($20f4).
DrawU32Decimal: U32ToAscii_B0 (radix $0a) then DrawString at ($cc30,$cc2f).
Inc $cc2f; wrap to 0 at $14 (20). Unlabeled orphan after Jump_000_0927 epilogue.
See docs/DIFF_1.04e_vs_1.05e.md ($cc2f/$cc30 retry/display counters).
DirList: file-browser directory enumerator; hides ezgb.dat via MemCmp_B0.
SD init, BACKUPSAVE, file browser. Kernel FPGA path; stays in menu loop.
Launched games never enter here — they write FRAM via normal MBC $A000 only.
Backup branch when page $11 $A000==$AA; then clears $A000=$00 on entry (before
the prompt, so [B]NO still clears it). $A001 read as auto-save selector; caches
$A202->$d3f6 (RTC), reads $A00F/$A010+ meta, calls BackupSavePrompt (01:6747).
FileBrowserEntry: clear $cc2f/$cc30/$c5a4; farcall mount/list setup; on fail SdReadRetryCount.
Jump_000_0fcd/0ff4: zero $c2a2/$c2a3 count; memset $c4a4+$c9db; wire $c9f1->$c4a4, $c9f3=$00fe; DirList.
Jump_000_10df: if count nonzero DrawDirEntryLabel; then Delay+$002d, ReadJoypad loop.
Pad $02/$01: page cursor sp+$13 by $10 vs $c2a2 count (sp+$12 dirty); $40 cycles sp+$0e UI mode; else MenuKeyDispatch.
Kernel entry after boot ROM (title EZGB). See docs/boot-map.md.
After bank1 switch, calls BootUnpackWramTables ($68b6) then BatteryCheck.
MenuKeyDispatch: START ($80) -> LastRomOverlay; else MenuDispatchAB.
Joypad byte is post-swap: A=$10, B=$20, START=$80 (see docs/launch-trace.md).
LastRomOverlay: draw chrome (bank8 DrawLastRomButtons) and copy the 255-byte
path record $A300 -> $c4a4. Shows basename only; relaunch (A) uses the full
path via LastRomRelaunch. See docs/last-rom.md.
DrawLine: Bresenham. ABI BC=(x0,y0) DE=(x1,y1). |dy|->$d72a, |dx|->$d729; err in wCircleErr/$d72d..$d731.
If |dx|<|dy| -> Jump_000_2519 (y-major); else x-major. Jump_000_23c4 may swap ends; $d72b = ±y step ($00/$ff).
Jump_000_2433: x-major pixel loop (ApplyPixel + row wrap $0130/$fed0); Jump_000_24bd: dy==0 horizontal run.
Jump_000_2519/jr_000_259e: y-major twin; Jump_000_260c: dx==0 vertical. Callers: DrawRect edges + circle chords.
PlotPixel: set one pixel in the mode-1 framebuffer. Register ABI: B=x, C=y.
Uses GfxRowTable ($2fbb) for scanline->VRAM; x bit from ROM $0010 masks.
Falls into ApplyPixel ($264a). Sibling GetPixel ($26cc) reads the same address.
DrawLineXY: stack ABI (x0,y0,x1,y1); ensure EnterGfxMode1 then DrawLine (BC/DE).
Thin C wrapper; e.g. bank8 chrome draws horizontal rules via this.
ApplyPixel: blit one masked pixel at HL (B=mask, C=~mask). STAT-safe VRAM RMW.
wDrawOp ($D723): 0=replace, 1=OR, 2=XOR, 3=AND-clear.
wDrawColor ($D734) bits 0/1 select which 2bpp planes to touch (color 0-3).
GetPixel: same x/y address math as PlotPixel; returns plane bits in E (0-3).
StoreDrawParams: store wDrawColor/wDrawColorB/wDrawOp ($D734/$D735/$D723);
called widely (~73 callers) before tile/string/pixel helpers.
PlotPixelXY: stack ABI (x, y); ensure EnterGfxMode1 then PlotPixel (B/C).
Thin C wrapper over PlotPixel; used by bit-pattern glyph drawers.
PlotPixelEx: stack (x, y, wDrawColor, wDrawOp); set params then PlotPixel.
Like PlotPixelXY but also writes draw color/op before the blit.
GfxRowTable: 144 words, scanline y -> VRAM address for mode-1 framebuffer.
Starts at $8100 (tile $10), 20 tiles wide (160px). Used by PlotPixel/GetPixel.
MapCp437(code, dir): CP437 <-> Unicode for codes $80-$FF. Stack: uint16 code,
uint16 dir. dir!=0: CP437->Unicode via Cp437UnicodeTable ($1ed5); dir==0:
linear search Unicode->CP437. codes < $80 pass through. Returns DE (=BC).
Table is exact IBM CP437 high-half (128 LE uint16s). ~12 callers in banks 3/5/6/7/9.
Cp437UnicodeTable: 128 LE uint16s, CP437 $80+$i -> Unicode. Perfect match to
WToUpper(code): FatFs-shaped WCHAR toupper. Stack uint16; returns DE.
ASCII: 'a'-'z' -= $20. Else binary-search wWToUpperKeys ($CC33) and replace
from wWToUpperVals ($D00F). Used for case-insensitive path compare.
U32Mul: SDCC runtime __mullong. Stub jp U32MulImpl ($2dc1); multiplies two stack u32s,
returns product in HL:DE. Body zeros a 4-byte acc then U32MulEngine (B=4)
which uses MulU8xU8 (8x8->16 shift-add mul) per byte. Callers e.g. bank1
scale time fields by 24/60. Sibling stubs: S32Div/U32Div/S32Mod/U32Mod.
S32Div: SDCC __divslong stub jp S32DivImpl ($29e6). Signed long ÷; quotient in HL:DE.
Zero/overflow via MemIsZero; uses signed negate helpers then unsigned engine.
U32Div: SDCC __divulong stub jp U32DivImpl ($2a77). Unsigned long ÷ via U32DivEngine;
returns quotient from scratch. U32ToAscii uses this with radix.
S32Mod: SDCC __modslong stub jp S32ModImpl ($2b28). Signed long %; remainder in HL:DE.
U32Mod: SDCC __modulong stub jp U32ModImpl ($2bfc). Unsigned long %; U32ToAscii digit path.
U8Div: SDCC __divuchar. Stack two u8; zero-extends via U16DivZext8; returns
quotient in DE. Bank4 decimal digit path: push 10 / n then call (n/10).
U8Mod: SDCC __moduchar. Same stack as U8Div; returns remainder in DE (n%10).
U16Div: SDCC __divuint. Stack two u16; U16DivMod engine; quotient in DE.
U16Mod: SDCC __moduint. Stack two u16; remainder in DE.
S8Div: SDCC __divschar. Stack two s8; sex via S16DivSex8; quotient in DE.
Siblings: S8Mod $289d, S16Div $28a9, S16Mod $28bd.
U16DivMod: unsigned 16-bit restoring divide. BC/DE in → BC=quot, DE=rem.
U16DivZext8 ($2949) zeros high bytes then falls in. S16DivMod ($2917) abs,
calls this, re-applies signs.
MemIsZero: scan B bytes at HL; Z if all zero else NZ. Used by U32/S32 div/mod
stubs to reject zero dividend/divisor before Call_000_2de0.
U32Shr: SDCC runtime, logical >> on unsigned long. Stack: u32 + shift count;
returns in HL:DE. Sibling S32Sar ($29ac) uses sra; U32Shl ($29c9) uses rl.
High fan-in is every C << >> on longs — name from the loop, no emulator needed.
S32Sar: SDCC runtime, arithmetic >> on signed long (sra on high byte).
U32Shl: SDCC runtime, << on unsigned long. Stack: u32 + shift count.
EnterGfxMode1: LCD off, prep VRAM/tilemap/callbacks, turn LCD on, set wGfxMode=1.
Defaults: wDrawOp=0 (replace), wDrawColor=3, wDrawColorB=0.
Draw helpers (DrawRect/PlotPixelXY/…) call this when wGfxMode!=1. Mode $02 set
elsewhere ($3d4a); full mode table still TODO.
Strrchr(ptr, char): walk to the NUL then scan back for char. Used with '/' to
find the basename of a launch path.
Memcpy(dest, src, len).
Memset(dest, byte, len): fill dest with byte. Sibling of Memcpy.
Strncpy(dest, src, n): copy until NUL or n bytes, then zero-pad remainder.
NegateBytes: two's-complement negate of B bytes at HL (0-sbc loop).
S32Div/S32Mod use this to abs signed long operands.
CStrLen(s): count bytes until NUL; length in DE. (Not Strlen — RGBDS STRLEN.)
MemZero: write 0 to B bytes at HL. U32DivEngine clears quot/rem scratch with this.
U32DivEngine: multi-byte restoring divide used by U32Div/U32Mod. Helpers:
MemZero, MemRol ($2ee2), MemSubCmp ($2ed8), MemSub ($2e30), IncWord ($2ecb).
IncWord: ++*(u16*)HL (inc low, carry into high).
CopyBytes: copy B bytes DE→HL (register ABI).
Delay(count): stack u16 → DelayDE. Busy-wait; callers pass e.g. $00c8/$002d.
DelayDE ($3a59) + DelayInner ($3a76) are the register/nested loops.
WaitJoypadMask: spin on ReadJoypadRaw until (A & B) nonzero. B = mask.
RegisterFont(HL=font desc): LCD off; find free 3-byte slot in wFontSlots ($d73a,
6 entries); store next-tile id + font ptr; SelectFont; if wGfxMode bit1 set,
UploadFontTiles; bump wFontNextTile by glyph count; LCD on. Returns HL=slot or 0.
SelectFont: copy slot triple → wFontBaseTile / wFontPtr / wFontFarFlag.
UploadFontTiles: blit current font glyphs into VRAM near $9000+wFontBaseTile.
Uses CopyTilesVram ($3a9c) or CopyTilesColor ($3ad2) per font header flags.
ResetTileText: EnterGfxMode2 path prep — InitGfxMode2 via $3d21, wFontNextTile=1,
clear wFontSlots, default draw colors, ClearBgMap.
ClearBgMap: fill BG map $9800 with tile 0 (32×32), STAT-safe.
TileNewline: wTileCursorX=0; ++Y or ScrollBgUp at bottom row ($11).
EnterGfxMode2: tear down mode-1 VBlank/LCD callbacks if LCD on, InitGfxMode2
(clear cursors + BG, wGfxMode=2), restore LCDC. Tilemap text mode.
PrintChar(A): if A==$0a TileNewline (unless wGfxMode bit3); else PutBgTile
then AdvanceTileCursor. Tilemap text path (cursor wTileCursorX/Y).
PutBgTile(A): map char through font at wFontPtr, write tile id to BG map
$9800 + y*32 + x (wTileCursorY/X). STAT-safe. Optional farcall when
wFontFarFlag==0 (via ResetTileText first).
AdvanceTileCursor: ++wTileCursorX; wrap at $13 and bump Y (tilemap text).
Clust2Sect_B3: FatFs clust2sect(fs, clst). clst-=2; reject if >= n_fatent-2;
return clst*csize + database via U32Mul. Canonical Clust2Sect_B9 at 09:4614.
Clust2Sect_B9: FatFs clust2sect(fs, clst). See Clust2Sect_B3.
RleUnpack: inline RLE decompress. HL=dest on entry; stream follows the call
(pop return addr as src). Bit7 run vs literal; 0 terminates; ret past stream.
Bank1 uses it to pack WToUpper tables into $CC33/$D00F and other WRAM blobs.
VramCopy: copy DE bytes BC→HL waiting for STAT mode≠2 (VRAM-safe).
VramCopyStack ($30ea) is the stack-ABI wrapper (dest, src, len).
ReadJoypad: returns the menu key byte (post-swap: A=$10, B=$20, START=$80).
ReadJoypadRaw ($3a16) is the lower-level read that ends with the swap.
DiskStatus(pdrv): FatFs disk_status stub — ld e,0 / ret (always ready).
Callers test E bits STA_NOINIT ($01) / STA_PROTECT ($04) and map to FR_
codes ($0c FR_NOT_ENABLED, $0a FR_WRITE_PROTECTED). Sibling DiskInitialize
($1a2c) is the same body; ReturnZero ($1a77) is the no-arg FR_OK stub.
DiNest: di; ++wIntNest ($d6d0). Pair EiNest ($0706) decs and ei when nest hits 0.
FarCallTrampoline and critical sections use this nest counter.
EiNest: --wIntNest; ei only when counter reaches 0 (nested DI safe).
FarCall_06_7309: stack thunk → bank6:$7309 via FarCallTrampoline (embedded
addr/bank after call). Siblings: FarCall_06_779a ($1941), FarCall_03_76cc
FarCall_03_76cc: 3-arg farcall to Lseek_B3 (03:76cc). Callers in bank1 push $ca0f
(FIL/fp) plus ofs words — FatFs f_lseek.
DiskInitialize(pdrv): FatFs disk_initialize stub — same ld e,0 / ret as
DiskStatus. Mount path maps STA_NOINIT -> FR_NOT_READY ($03).
FarCall stub: repack stack args, FarCallTrampoline to DiskRead_B2 (SD sector
read), return E. Sibling FarCallDiskWrite ($1a53) is the write path.
FarCall stub: repack stack args, FarCallTrampoline to DiskWrite_B2 (SD sector
write), return E. Sibling FarCallDiskRead ($1a2f) is the read path.
SetFpga7F30_B2: unlock $7F00/10/20, write stack u8 to $7F30, commit $7FF0.
Same shape as SetFpgaPage but targets $7F30. SD read/write prologue uses
$01 then $03. Sibling SdWindowPeek ($4020) reads $A000 (wait-for-ready).
SdWindowPeek: ld a,[$a000] → E. SD paths poll until E==$e1 after SetFpga7F30.
SD sector read (disk_read). Program LBA via $7FB0-$7FB4, wait, then copy
from $A000 into caller buffer via VramCopyStack. Called as FarCallDiskRead.
Sibling DiskWrite_B2 is the write path (buffer -> $A000, then trigger).
Prologue: SetFpga7F30_B2.
SD sector write (disk_write). Copy buffer to $A000 via VramCopyStack, then
program $7FB0/$7FB1/$7FB2 and trigger. Prologue: SetFpga7F30_B2 $01 then $03.
Called as FarCallDiskWrite. Sibling DiskRead_B2 is the read path.
MemCpy16_B3: copy (count/2) little-endian words dest←src while count≥2.
Bank-local FatFs mem helper. Canonical MemCpy16_B9 at 09:4001; B6/B7 siblings.
MemSet8_B3: fill dest with byte, 8-bit count (FatFs mem_set). B5/B6/B7 siblings;
bank9 has MemSet16_B9 ($4102) with a 16-bit count instead.
GetFat_B3: FatFs get_fat(fs, clst). Rejects clst<2 or clst>=fs->n_fatent (+$16);
dispatches FAT12/16/32 via fs_type jump table (FAT12 uses clst+clst/2).
Canonical GetFat_B9 at 09:4713; also GetFat_B6/$4534, GetFat_B7/$4707.
SyncWindow_B3: same as SyncWindow_B9 (09:41e5). Bank-local FatFs copy.
MemSet16_B9: fill dest with byte for 16-bit count (bank9 FatFs mem_set variant).
GetFat_B9: FatFs get_fat(fs, clst) — next cluster from FAT. See GetFat_B3 note.
SetRomLoadCtrl_B8: bank-8 copy of SetRomLoadCtrl_B4 — unlock, $7F36=stack u8,
commit. SetFpgaPage_B8 ($6e7a) is the $7FC0 sibling beside it.
SetFpgaPage_B8: bank-8 copy of SetFpgaPage (unlock, $7FC0=page, commit).
MemCpy16_B9: copy words dest←src while byte-count≥2 (FatFs-shaped mem_cpy).
RetStub_B9 (09:4000) is the lone ret in front; B5/B6 siblings match.
MoveWindow_B3: same as MoveWindow_B9 (09:437e). Byte-identical to MoveWindow_B7;
banks 3 and 7 share a ~4KB identical block from $4000 (linked FS + callers).
SyncWindow_B6: same as SyncWindow_B9 (09:41e5). Bank-local FatFs copy;
body matches aside from relocated absolute jp/call targets.
MoveWindow_B6: same as MoveWindow_B9 (09:437e). Relocated copy (jp/call immediates
shifted vs bank 3/7/9); not a different algorithm.
SyncWindow_B7: same as SyncWindow_B9 (09:41e5). Byte-identical to SyncWindow_B3.
MoveWindow_B7: same as MoveWindow_B9 (09:437e). Byte-identical to MoveWindow_B3.
SyncWindow_B9(fs): FatFs-shaped. If fs->wflag (+4) set, disk_write winsect
(+0x2e) from win[] (+0x32) via DiskWrite_B2; clear dirty; mirror to other
FAT copies when winsect is in the FAT region. Returns 0=OK, nonzero=err.
Static match to ChaN FatFs sync_window. Bank copies: SyncWindow_B3/B6/B7.
MoveWindow_B9(fs, sector): FatFs-shaped sector cache. If sector==winsect (+0x2e)
return 0; else SyncWindow_B9, disk_read into win[] (+0x32) via DiskRead_B2,
on failure set winsect=0xFFFFFFFF. Args: ptr, u32 sector. Returns E (0=OK).
Static match to ChaN FatFs move_window (R0.10+). Bank copies: MoveWindow_B3/B6/B7.
Why copies: only one switchable bank is mapped at $4000; each FS consumer bank
links its own near-callable MoveWindow_B9 instead of far-calling a single owner.
SyncFs_B9(fs): FatFs sync_fs. SyncWindow_B9; if fs_type(+0)==FAT32(3) and
fsi_flag(+5)==1, build FSInfo in win(+0x32): 0x55AA, LeadSig RRaA, StrucSig rrAa,
copy free_clst(+0x0e)/last_clst(+0x0a), disk_write via DiskWrite_B2, clear fsi_flag.
Ends with ReturnZero stand-in for disk_ioctl(CTRL_SYNC). Bank copies: 03:4434, 07.
GenNumName_B9(dst, src, lfn, seq): FatFs gen_numname. MemCpy16 11-byte SFN;
if seq>5, CRC over LFN bits with poly 0x11021; write '~'+hex into name field.
Static match to ChaN FatFs gen_numname. Likely copies: 03:61f6, 06:6023, 07:6051.
DirRegister_B9(dp): FatFs dir_register. Rejects AM_VOL (+0xb & $20) as FR_INVALID_NAME;
on NS_LOSS, GenNumName_B9 + Clone_09644b (dir_find) loop seq 1..100 (FR_DENIED at 100);
allocates entries (Clone_095c8f), MoveWindow_B9, LFN/SFN fill. Returns E=FRESULT.
Static match to ChaN FatFs dir_register. Likely copy: 06:64c8.
MoveWindow_B5(fs, sector): FatFs move_window without SyncWindow (bank 5 has no
dirty-window path). If sector!=winsect(+0x2e), disk_read into win(+0x32) via
DiskRead_B2; on failure winsect=0xFFFFFFFF. Same role as MoveWindow_B3/B6/B7/B9.
DirNext_B5(dp, stretch): FatFs dir_next. ++index(+4); if (index&15)==0 advance
sector/cluster (stretch may grow chain via far get/put_fat); else dir ptr +=32
into win(+0x32). Returns E=FRESULT (0 OK, 4 FR_NO_FILE). Same role as DirNext_B9
(09:580c); bank5 body differs (FarCallTrampoline, no near SyncWindow).
CheckFs_B5(fs, sect): FatFs check_fs. Clear wflag(+4), winsect(+0x2e)=FFFFFFFF,
MoveWindow_B5(sect); classify boot sector (return 0=FAT VBR, 1/2/3=other/err).
Called from FindVolume_B5.
CheckFs_B9: same as CheckFs_B5 (05:6337). Bank-local FatFs check_fs copy.
Orphan between GetLdNumber_B9 and FindVolume_B9.
FindVolume_B5(rfs, path, mode): FatFs find_volume. Clears *rfs; GetLdNumber_B5
(neg→FR_INVALID_DRIVE); FatFs[vol] at wFatFsTable ($C5A5) (null→FR_NOT_ENABLED);
DiskStatus/DiskInitialize; CheckFs_B5 on candidate sectors. Returns E=FRESULT.
DirRead_B5(dp, vol): FatFs dir_read. Scan entries via MoveWindow_B5 + DirNext_B5;
skip DDEM ($E5), match AM_VOL vs vol arg, handle LFN ($0F). Returns E=FRESULT
(4=FR_NO_FILE at end). Copies: DirRead_B7 ($64f6), DirRead_B9 ($66a6).
DirRead_B7: bank-7 near-call copy of DirRead_B5/B9 (FatFs dir_read).
DirRead_B9: bank-9 near-call copy of DirRead_B5 (FatFs dir_read).
Orphan after Jump_009_66a3; sits just before DirRegister_B9.
Open_B9(fp, path, mode): FatFs f_open. RtcReadPage; FindVolume_B9; FollowPath_B9;
create path uses CreateChain_B9 / DirRegister_B9 / RemoveChain_B9 / SyncFs_B9.
Large -$47 frame; bank-9 only in this link (no B3/B5/B6/B7 twin at same shape).
RemoveChain_B3: bank-3 near-call copy of RemoveChain_B9 (FatFs remove_chain).
GetFat_B3 + PutFat_B3; same shape as RemoveChain_B6/B9. Orphan before CreateChain_B3.
FindVolume_B3: bank-3 near-call copy of FindVolume_B6/B9 (FatFs find_volume front).
GetLdNumber_B3; FatFs table $C5A5; DiskStatus; FR $0b/$0c/$0a. -$12 frame.
Orphan after Jump_003_7392; sits just before Validate_B3.
Lseek_B3(fp, ofs): FatFs f_lseek. Validate_B3; U32Shl/Mod; CreateChain_B3 to
extend; GetFat_B3 + Clust2Sect_B3. FarCall disk R/W helpers. -$29 frame.
Target of FarCall_03_76cc; orphan after Jump_003_76c6.
Open_B6(fp, path, mode): FatFs f_open (bank-6). FindVolume_B6 + FollowPath_B6 +
DirRegister_B6 path; same role as Open_B9. Target of FarCall_06_7309
(BackupSaveDump). Orphan after prior epilogue; -$42 frame.
Readdir_B5(dp, fno): FatFs f_readdir. Validate_B5; DirSdi_B5 rewind on null fno;
DirRead_B5 + GetFileInfo_B5 + DirNext_B5. Distinct from DirRead_B5 (dir_read).
Read_B6(fp, buff, btr): FatFs f_read. Validate_B6; cluster walk via GetFat_B6 +
Clust2Sect_B6; MemCpy16_B6; disk via FarCall_02_*. Target of FarCall_06_779a.
Write_B7(fp, buff, btw): FatFs f_write. Validate_B7; CreateChain_B7 to grow;
Clust2Sect_B7 + MemCpy16_B7; disk FarCall_02_*. Orphan after Jump_007_7736.
Validate_B9(obj): FatFs validate (bank-9). Same shape as Validate_B3/B5/B6/B7.
Orphan between FindVolume_B9 epilogue and Open_B9.
Chdir_B5(path): FatFs f_chdir. FindVolume_B5 + FollowPath_B5 + LdClust_B5;
no DirSdi (contrast Opendir_B5). -$35 frame.
Opendir_B5(dp, path): FatFs f_opendir. Null dp→FR_INVALID_OBJECT ($09);
FindVolume_B5 + FollowPath_B5 + LdClust_B5 + DirSdi_B5. -$19 frame;
sits just before Readdir_B5.
Getcwd_B5(buff, len): FatFs f_getcwd. Clears buff; FindVolume_B5 (mode 0);
walks via DirSdi_B5/DirRead_B5/DirNext_B5 + GetFileInfo_B5 (no FollowPath).
-$5b frame; between Chdir_B5 and Opendir_B5.
Close_B3(fp): FatFs f_close. Fsync_B3 then Validate_B3; clears FIL fs ptr.
Target of FarCall_03_768f; orphan after Fsync path epilogue Jump_003_768c.
Clust2Sect_B5(fs, clst): FatFs clust2sect. Same shape as Clust2Sect_B3/B6/B7/B9;
U32Mul by csize. Bank-5 was missing from the earlier clone stamp pass.
GetFat_B5(fs, clst): FatFs get_fat. MoveWindow_B5 + U32Shr/Shl FAT entry path;
byte-identical call shape to GetFat_B9 (563 ops). Bank-5 was missing from stamp.
DrawTimeAutosaveScreen: sp+$3c=$A200; sp+$3d hilite; sp+$3e dirty; sp+$3f field 0..5; sp+$40 SET/SAV.
Redraw Jump_004_48f5; FPGA $A008..$A00C load @49ee; SAV date draw @4e42; input @5162 ReadJoypad.
Pad $02/$01: step field; $04: inc value (yr wrap $63 @sp+$2e, mon wrap $0c @sp+$2c, …); $08: dec mirror @5407.
Jump_004_5211+: sp+$3f dispatches bump/wrap; Jump_004_524a field2 uses $5276 month-len jp table; all converge Jump_004_53f2 (sp+$3e=$01)->48f5.
Jump_004_58d6 toggles $A200; Jump_004_5912 ret. Residual Jump_: clone bump arms + SET-mode pad twins.
TimeLabelStr: NUL-term "TIME:" column title for DrawTimeAutosaveScreen (.text blocked).
TimeSetLabelStr: NUL-term "SET" when auto-save flag (sp+$40) is clear (.text blocked).
AutoSaveLabelStr: NUL-term "AUTO SAVE:" column title (.text blocked).
AutoSaveSavLabelStr: NUL-term "SAV" shown when auto-save flag is set (.text blocked).
PathSlashStr_B4: NUL-term "/" for CStrCat date path fragments in time UI (.text blocked).
DrawFwVersionScreen: build "FWx " prefix on stack, SdWindowPeek_B8, U32ToAscii_B0
version, then DrawRect/DrawString. Orphan after Jump_008_6fcd; -$34 frame.
BackupOpenSaverPath: build $c3a5="/SAVER/"+name; Jump_001_51b2 force ".sav"; Open_B6 FarCall_06_7309 → $ca0f.
Jump_001_5298: open ok → re-open FA_READ, copy fsize, Jump_001_5327 read $200 + VramCopyStack into cart window.
Jump_001_53ee RTC/meta restore if sp+$08; Jump_001_54d1 open-fail blanks $FF then same write loop; both → PreLaunchFramStamp.
DrawBrowserEntries: file-browser rows from path buf at $c2a0. Clamp count vs $c2a2;
per row DrawString name; if attr at +$fe == $10 (AM_DIR) draw "DIR" ($42b6), else
U32ToAscii_B0 size. Orphan after prior ret at Jump_001_40e0.
CStrCmp(a, b): signed char strcmp. Walk [bc] vs [de]; return DE = *a - *b (sex).
CStrChr(s, c): find first c in NUL-terminated s; return pointer in DE (0 if none).
SetFpga7F34_35_B1: same as SetFpga7F34_35_B4 (04:40fc). Unlock; write stack u8s
to $7F34 then $7F35; commit $7FF0. Orphan after SetFpgaPage_B1.
GetPixelXY: stack ABI (x, y) → GetPixel (B/C). Sibling of PlotPixelXY.
PrintCharArg: stack u8 → PrintChar (A). Thin C ABI wrapper.
PutBgTileArg: stack u8 → PutBgTile (A). Thin C ABI wrapper.
SetTileCursor: stack (x, y) → wTileCursorX/Y. Tile-text cursor (vs SetTextCursor).
GetTileCursorX: ensure EnterGfxMode2 if needed; return wTileCursorX in E.
GetTileCursorY: ensure EnterGfxMode2 if needed; return wTileCursorY in E.
BlitTileXY: ensure mode-1; stack args → BlitTile (B/C/DE/HL).
VramLoadTiles8100Arg: ensure mode-1; stack BC → VramLoadTiles8100.
WaitJoypadMaskArg: stack mask → WaitJoypadMask (B); return pressed in E.
RegisterFontArg: stack font-desc ptr → RegisterFont (HL); return slot in DE.
SelectFontArg: stack font-desc ptr → SelectFont (HL); returns DE=0.
Mount_B5(fs, path, opt): FatFs f_mount. GetLdNumber_B5 (neg→FR_INVALID_DRIVE);
bind/clear FatFs[vol] at wFatFsTable ($C5A5); opt==1 → FindVolume_B5.
StClust_B7: same as StClust_B9 (09:5e0a). Bank-local FatFs st_clust copy.
Orphan between LdClust_B7 and CmpLfn_B7.
U32ModImpl: body of U32Mod stub. MemIsZero early-out; else U32DivEngine remainder path.
U32MulImpl: body of U32Mul stub. Thin frame around U32MulEngine with B=4.
GenNumName_B5: same as GenNumName_B9 (09:6201). Bank-local FatFs gen_numname copy.
Orphan between CmpLfn_B5 and SumSfn_B5 (no PutLfn in this bank).
GetFileInfo_B5(fno, dp): FatFs get_fileinfo. Build dotted SFN into fno(+9) from
dir entry; apply NT case bits; copy LFN via MapCp437 when present.
GetFileInfo_B7: same as GetFileInfo_B5 (05:56d1). Bank-local FatFs get_fileinfo copy.
Orphan between DirRegister_B7 and CreateName_B7.
GetLdNumber_B7: same as GetLdNumber_B9 (09:7510). Bank-local FatFs get_ldnumber copy.
Orphan immediately before Validate_B7; size matches B5/B6 (0xd7).
CreateName_B9(dp, path): FatFs create_name. Parse next path segment (stop on / or \);
build SFN/LFN + NSFLAG. Copies: CreateName_B3/B5/B6/B7.
GenNumName_B6: same as GenNumName_B9 (09:6201). Bank-local FatFs gen_numname copy.
DirRegister_B6: same as DirRegister_B9 (09:68b0). Bank-local FatFs dir_register copy.
GenNumName_B7: same as GenNumName_B9 (09:6201). Bank-local FatFs gen_numname copy.
DirFind_B9(dp): FatFs dir_find. Match SFN/LFN pattern against directory entries
(DirNext_B9). Copies: DirFind_B3/B5/B6/B7.
SyncFs_B3(fs): same as SyncFs_B9 (09:4447). Bank-local FatFs sync_fs copy.
GenNumName_B3: same as GenNumName_B9 (09:6201). Bank-local FatFs gen_numname copy.
Validate_B3(obj): FatFs validate. Reject null obj/fs, fs_type==0, or id mismatch
(obj+2 vs fs+6). Returns E=0 OK else FR_INVALID_OBJECT. Copies: Validate_B5/B6/B7.
Fsync_B3(fp): FatFs f_sync. Validate_B3; if FA_WRITTEN(+4 bit5), flush dirty
sector (bit6) via DiskWrite_B2, update dir entry (MoveWindow/Clone_095e0a/RtcReadPage),
SyncFs_B3. Returns E=FRESULT.
FindVolume_B9(rfs, path, mode): FatFs find_volume (was Clone_0976f7).
Same role as FindVolume_B5/B6.
PutFat_B9 / RemoveChain_B9 / CreateChain_B9 / DirSdi_B9 / DirAlloc_B9 /
LdClust_B9 / StClust_B9 / CmpLfn_B9 / PutLfn_B9 / SumSfn_B9 / FollowPath_B9 /
MemCmp_B9 / MemChr_B9: FatFs internals renamed from Clone_09* families;
bank copies keep matching _B3/_B5/_B6/_B7 suffixes where present.
SyncFs_B7(fs): same as SyncFs_B9 (09:4447). Unlabeled mgbdis entry after MoveWindow_B7.
DirRegister_B3: same as DirRegister_B9 (09:68b0). Unlabeled mgbdis entry.
DirRegister_B7: same as DirRegister_B9 (09:68b0). Unlabeled mgbdis entry.
DirNext_B9(dp, stretch): FatFs dir_next. Bank copies: DirNext_B3/B6/B7; B5 at
05:4a95 is a divergent body with the same control-flow shape.
SetFpgaPage ($7FC0). Bank-0 leaf; used before RTC reads at $A008+.
Battery gate: FPGA SRAM page $11, read $A201 (expect $88 = not dry).
Status-box draw family (bank 8), each reached via FarCallTrampoline:
DrawReadingBox + ReadingBoxStr, DrawLoadingBox + LoadingBoxStr,
DrawErrorFileBox + ErrorFileBoxStr, DrawLastRomButtons + LastRomReturnStr/StartStr.
See docs/last-rom.md.
FarCall_05_4378: stack thunk via FarCallTrampoline to 05:4378.
Auto-proposed by scripts/propose-labels.py.
SdWindowPeek_B8: ld a,[$a000] → E. Bank-8 sibling of SdWindowPeek; used after
FPGA page switches (ready poll). Was briefly mislabeled SetFpga7FD2_B8.
SetFpga7FD2On_B8: unlock $7F00/10/20, write $01 to $7FD2, commit $7FF0.
SetFpga7FD2Off_B8: unlock $7F00/10/20, write $00 to $7FD2, commit $7FF0.
RtcWriteTimeFromDayDelta: RtcToDayCount − stack day count ($d3f2/$d3f4); S32Div/Mod
by 60/24 into HMS; write $A018–$A01C (page $06) and $A220–$A224 (page $03/$11).
Inverse of RtcReadDaysClearRegs clear path.
MapCartTypeToUi(type@sp+$02): Jump_001_5d11..5d41 map cart byte → $d3eb UI bucket 0/1/2/3/4/6 (default 6).
Jump_001_5dbf: types $0f/$10 set $d3f0=1 (timer); Jump_001_5de1: $1c..$1e via $5dfd jp-table set $d3f1=1.
Outputs feed DrawCardTypeScreen / launch path. Falls into RomLoaderMain.
ClearNegZero32: HL→MSB of 4-byte LE value; if value is 0 or $80000000,
clear sign bit (force -0 → +0). Used by S32Cmp.
MemCmp3Down: compare 3 bytes at DE vs HL walking downward; NZ on first diff.
Local helper for S32Cmp MSB-side compare.
S32Cmp: signed long compare of stack args at sp+7 and sp+b (MSB at high addr).
Canon ±0 via ClearNegZero32, then sign-dispatch + MemCmp3Down. No external
callers in this build (only self-refs); kept as SDCC runtime residue.
IsLeapYear: stack u16 year → E=1 if leap else 0. Gregorian: %4, then %100/%400.
DateToDaysSince1970: date struct ptr on stack; accumulate 365/366 from 1970
via IsLeapYear, then month/day. Returns day count in HL:DE.
Month lengths from wDaysInMonth / wDaysInMonthLeap.
RtcToDayCount: SetFpgaPage_B1 $06, BCD-decode RTC bytes at $A00E/$A00D/$A00B…
(year+=$07d0/2000), then DateToDaysSince1970. Returns HL:DE day count.
RtcReadDaysClearRegs: RtcToDayCount → HL:DE; then zero $A018–$A01C (FPGA page $06)
and $A220–$A224 (page $03, $4000=$11 window). Callers stash days before launch/FRAM.
DrawInfoPanelRect: StoreDrawParams($0002,$03) then DrawRect fill=$23 corners $7d25/$016c.
Shared chrome behind Cardtype/BOOT/ROM-info style screens.
DrawCardTypeScreen: DrawInfoPanelRect then DrawString CardtypeStr and MBC name
(MbcNoneStr/MBC1/… via $d3eb index jump table).
BackupSaveDump: FRAM→SAVER dump used by BackupSavePrompt. Opens via FarCall_06_7309
($ca0f path obj, $c3a5, mode $12), writes chunks (FarCall_07_7739), spinner . / .. / ...,
touches page $11 RTC/meta. Args: two size words + path ptr (often empty $68a9).
SetIeReg: DiNest; clear rIF; load rIE from stack u8; EiNest. Safe IE write.
RemoveVBlankCallbackArg / RemoveLcdCallbackArg / RemoveTimerCallbackArg /
RemoveSerialCallbackArg / RemoveJoypadCallbackArg: stack ptr → BC then Remove*.
Register*CallbackArg siblings at $0756..$0782 likewise wrap Register*.
PlotBitRowXY(flags, x, y): plot up to 8 pixels from a bit row via PlotPixelXY.
bit0→x+7 … bit7→x (MSB left). Used by bit-pattern glyph drawers.
Orphan after WaitJoypadSelect; Call_000_0803 is a mid-body fallthrough label.
S32DivImpl: body of S32Div stub. MemIsZero early-out; signed abs then U32DivEngine.
S32ModImpl: body of S32Mod stub. MemIsZero early-out; signed abs then remainder path.
BootRomInfoMenu: two-item menu BootMenuBootStr / BootMenuRomInfoStr over DrawInfoPanelRect.
Up/Down move; A on ROM info → DrawCardTypeScreen; A on BOOT draws BootMenuLoadingStr and
returns selection in E; B returns E=$ff. Orphan before BackupSaveDump.
CardtypeStr: NUL-term "Cardtype:" title for DrawCardTypeScreen (.text blocked).
MBC name table follows: MbcNoneStr..MbcNotStr, then RomSizeLabelStr/SizeKbStr/
RamSizeLabelStr/BatteryLabelStr/BatteryYesStr/BatteryNoStr.
SaverDirSlashStr: NUL-term "/SAVER/" memcpy src for BackupOpenSaverPath (.text blocked).
Sibling SaverDirStr (00:16e2) is "/SAVER" without trailing slash.
BootMenuBootStr: NUL-term "BOOT" row label for BootRomInfoMenu (.text blocked).
BootMenuRomInfoStr: NUL-term "ROM info" row label for BootRomInfoMenu (.text blocked).
BootMenuLoadingStr: NUL-term "Loading" drawn when user picks BOOT (.text blocked).
MenuTabSdStr / MenuTabSetStr / MenuTabHelpStr: " SD " / " SET " / " HELP " tab labels
(.text blocked). Was misdisassembled as jr noise before DrawReadingBox.
ReadingBoxStr: NUL-term "Reading..." for DrawReadingBox (.text blocked).
LoadingBoxStr: NUL-term "Loading..." for DrawLoadingBox (.text blocked).
ErrorFileBoxStr: NUL-term "Error file" for DrawErrorFileBox (.text blocked).
LastRomReturnStr / LastRomStartStr: "[B]return" / "[A]start" for DrawLastRomButtons.
SdReadRetryCount: SD dir-read failure path. DrawString FileSystemErrorStr at ($0100,y);
then infinite loop at $0998. Reads $cc2f (outer counter from DrawU32Decimal) but discards.
S8Mul: sex two stack s8 → s16, then U16Mul. Bank-5 RST stub jp target.
MulU8xU8Arg: stack two u8 → C/E then MulU8xU8. Entry just above register ABI body.
SetFpgaRomSize_B4(arg@sp+$0a): switch → 16-bit bank mask @sp+$02, then clamp vs $c2a4/$c2a5 caps.
Jump_004_42e3 default 0; Jump_004_42ea: if mask > (caps-1), lower via $c2a4 bit ladder ($01→1 … $80→$ff) + $c2a5:$01→$01ff.
Jump_004_439f: FPGA unlock $7F00/$10/$20=$e1/$e2/$e3; write mask lo→$7FC1, hi→$7FC2; commit $7FF0=$e4. Launch @$1604.
RomLoad_ClearCartWindow_B8: SetFpga7FD2Off; zero $A0C0..+$200; then 0x2000x
RomLoad_WriteCmdWindow + page $05 BuildAndRun wait (clear cart window). Before DrawFwVersionScreen.
U32MulEngine: multi-byte unsigned mul (B digit pairs). Zeros dest via MemZero,
per-byte MulU8xU8 + PropagateCarry. U32Mul stub drives this with B=4.
PropagateCarry: walk C bytes at HL adding 0+carry (adc). After multi-byte add in mul.
VramLoadTiles8100: VramCopy BC→$8100 for $1680 bytes (tile $10+ framebuffer pool).
Stack wrapper ensures EnterGfxMode1 first.
BlitTile: B/C tile row/col via GfxRowTable; VramCopy $10 bytes (2bpp tile) to FB.
Optional second plane from saved DE. Stack wrapper ensures EnterGfxMode1.
VramFill: STAT-safe fill — wait mode≠2, write B to [HL++) DE times. EnterGfxMode1
zeros $8100.. with this; VramFillActiveWinMap/BgMap clear $9800/$9C00 ($0400).
DrawDirEntryLabel: browser row label. If size u32>$14, map bank via $4000, measure
name at $c2a0+ofs, format into $c4a4 (farcall), DrawString. Skips tiny entries.
RomLoad_BuildAndRunPoll: build InitiatePoll trampoline at $D100
(arg $ff) via RomLoad_Build_B4, then call $D100.
SetFpga7F34_35_B4: unlock $7F00/10/20; write stack u8s to $7F34 then
$7F35; commit $7FF0. Scratch via push af / add sp,$02.
CStrCat(dest, src): append NUL-term src onto dest. Walk dest to NUL,
then copy src incl. terminator. Stack RTL: char* dest, char* src.
Named CStrCat (not StrCat) to avoid RGBDS STRCAT.
RomLoad_WriteCmdWindow_B8(buf): page=$02, $7F36=$01, copy $0200 bytes
from buf to $A000 (load cmd window), then ctrl/page off.
RomLoad_BuildAndRunPeek_B8: build SdWindowPeek_B8 trampoline at $D000
(arg $ff) via RomLoad_Build_B8, then call $D000.
RomLoad_BuildAndRun7FD2Wait_B8: build Fpga7FD2WaitClear_B8 trampoline at
$D000 (arg $ff), then call it. Caller wraps with DiNest/EiNest.
Fpga7FD2WaitClear_B8: $7FD2=$01, poll [$A000] until 0, then $7FD2=$00.
Entry is $473f (after nop pad at $473e).
RetStub_B5: Lone ret at bank start (before MemCpy16_B5). Callers push args then call; compiled-out stub (often debug/print).
RetStub_B6: Lone ret at bank start (before MemCpy16_B6). Same RetStub_B9 pattern.
RetStub_B9: Lone ret at bank start (before MemCpy16_B9). FatFs bank callers push 2 words then call; no-op.
VBlankCb_Bg8000: VBlank callback registered by EnterGfxMode1. Sets LCDC bit4
(BG tile data $8000) and LYC=$48. Pair with LycCb_Bg8800 STAT LYC ISR.
LycCb_Bg8800: STAT LYC callback (EnterGfxMode1 → RegisterLcdCallback). Wait
STAT mode≠2, clear LCDC bit4 (BG tile data back to $8800). Was jr_000_2a6a.
SetFpga7FD4_B1: unlock $7F00/10/20; write stack u8 to $7FD4; commit $7FF0.
Same shape as SetFpga7FD0_B4. Orphan before LoaderPrepPath.
SetFpga7FC4_B4(mode): map stack u8 → $7FC4 (0/0/$0f/$07/$03) via unlock/commit.
Mode 0 also peeks wCartTypeUi ($d3eb). Orphan after SetFpgaRomSize_B4.
SetFpga7FC3_B4: unlock; write [$c5a3] to $7FC3; commit. Sibling of SetFpgaPage
($7FC0) / SetFpga7FC4_B4.
RomLoad_CopyCmdWindowPoll_B4: SetRomLoadCtrl_B4($01) map cmd window; copy $200
bytes stack→$A000 via VramCopyStack; RomLoad_BuildAndRunPoll. Before CStrCat.
InitTimeAutosaveFpga_B4: SetFpgaPage $06; write key bytes $33..$19 to $A008–$A00E;
SetFpga7FD0_B4($01); page $00. Orphan immediately before DrawTimeAutosaveScreen.
SetFpga7F37_B4: unlock; write stack u8 to $7F37; commit. Sibling of
SetRomLoadCtrl_B4 ($7F36). Orphan after SetRomLoadCtrl_B4.
RomLoad_ResetIntoRom_B4: clear $7F31/$7F32; MBC writes $2000=$01/$3000=$00;
then $7FE0=$80 soft-boot into loaded ROM (hangs via jp self if still here).
RomLoad_BuildAndRunReset_B4: RomLoad_Build_B4 trampoline for
RomLoad_ResetIntoRom_B4 at $D000 (arg $ff), then call it.
SetFpgaPageAlt_B4: byte-identical to SetFpgaPage_B4 (04:466e) — unlock,
$7FC0=stack u8, commit. Earlier copy sitting just before SetFpgaRomSize_B4.
VramFillActiveWinMap: pick window tilemap base from LCDC bit6 ($9800/$9C00),
then VramFill $0400 bytes with B. Sibling VramFillActiveBgMap uses BG map bit3.
VramFillActiveBgMap: pick BG tilemap base from LCDC bit3 ($9800/$9C00), then
VramFill $0400 bytes with B. Shares tail at $3d86 with VramFillActiveWinMap.
Closedir_B5(dp): FatFs f_closedir. Validate_B5; on OK clear DIR fs ptr (2 bytes).
No Fsync (contrast Close_B3). Orphan immediately before Readdir_B5.
LaunchSetup: launch-trace step after BackupOpenSaverPath ($15b2→$58b0). Big frame;
Open_B6 path; Clust2Sect/GetFat_B5 walk; Close_B3. Feeds later FPGA 7FCx config.
See docs/launch-trace.md.
MemFill: store A into B bytes at HL++ (register ABI). Orphan between MemSub and U32MulEngine.
FileSystemErrorStr: NUL-term "File system error!" for SdReadRetryCount.
Marked .text:13 in kernel.sym so MemCmp_B0 at $09af stays instruction-aligned.
MemCmp_B0(s1, s2, n): byte-identical to MemCmp_B5/B9 (FatFs mem_cmp). -$09 frame.
DirList hides ezgb.dat via this.
BootUnpackWramTables: KernelEntry bank-1 call before BatteryCheck. Sets $CC31/$CC32=$EE,
RleUnpack → $CC33 then $D00F (WToUpper tables), then $D3F9/$D5EB/$D6A7/$D6B3/$D6BF; ret $7390.
BackupUiStrings: NUL strings after BackupSavePrompt (BACKUPSAVE/Saving../[B]NO/[A]OK).
.text:22 through $68b5 so BootUnpackWramTables stays aligned.
wWToUpperKeys: u16 key table for WToUpper binary search (~$EE entries).
Filled by BootUnpackWramTables via RleUnpack; parallel vals at wWToUpperVals.
wWToUpperVals: u16 replacement table parallel to wWToUpperKeys. RleUnpack dest.
DrawBrowserDetail: farcall from FileBrowserEntry ($10d9 blob → 01:42ba). -$24 frame;
StoreDrawParams/DrawString/U32ToAscii_B0 panel for the selected browser row.
FormatFileSize: format u32 size using wFileSizeFmtLo ($D3F9) or wFileSizeFmtHi ($D5EB)
when size≥$1000 within the <$10000 path. -$0a frame; after BrowserDirStr2.
BrowserDirStr: "DIR" drawn by DrawBrowserEntries for AM_DIR rows.
wDaysInMonth: 12-byte non-leap month lengths (31,28,…). BootUnpackWramTables RLE.
wDaysInMonthLeap: 12-byte leap month lengths (31,29,…). Used by DateToDaysSince1970.
wDaysInYearTab: u16s 365/365/365/366 from BootUnpack (year-length variants).
wFileSizeFmtLo: threshold/scale pairs for FormatFileSize (sizes <$1000 in low path).
wFileSizeFmtHi: threshold/scale pairs for FormatFileSize (sizes ≥$1000, <$10000).
EzgbDatStr: NUL-term "ezgb.dat"; DirList hides this name via MemCmp_B0.
Marked .text:9 so DrawDirEntryLabel at $0bd1 stays instruction-aligned.
MicroSdInitErrorStr: NUL-term "Micro SD initial error!" for SdMenuMain.
Marked .text:3f covering OK/SAVER/slash/.GBC/.GB through U32ToAscii_B0.
MicroSdInitOkStr: NUL-term "Micro SD initial OK!" for SdMenuMain.
SaverDirStr: NUL-term "/SAVER"; BackupBranchEntry Open_B9 path.
PathSlashStr: NUL-term "/"; path join in browser/backup helpers.
ExtGbcStr: NUL-term ".GBC" extension compare/append.
ExtGbStr: NUL-term ".GB" extension compare/append.
BatteryDryPadStr: NUL-term " " spacer drawn before BATTERY/DRY!!! chrome.
Marked .text:17 so FarCall_06_7309 at $1926 stays instruction-aligned.
BatteryDryTitleStr: NUL-term "BATTERY" for BatteryCheck dry notice.
BatteryDryMsgStr: NUL-term "DRY!!!" for BatteryCheck dry notice.
BatteryDryOkStr: NUL-term "[A]OK" dismiss prompt for BatteryCheck.
